title: gleichenia squamulosa
intro: Gleichenia squamulosa, also known as the scale-leaved tree fern, is a species of fern in the family Gleicheniaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and easing respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be dried or made into teas, infusions, and extracts to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
